issues.description: OnPlay effect is missing the deck peek mechanic (look at 5 cards). SearchDeck alone does not capture the full effect: must look at top 5, reveal up to 1 Navy non-Kujyaku, add to hand, then place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL omits the peek, ordering, and filter logic entirely.

TrashFromHand is incorrect. The effect says 'trash this Character' (the card itself on board), not from hand. Should be KO or similar self-trash mechanic. TrashFromHand targets hand, not the battlefield.
Activate trigger should target the Character card itself (in play) for trashing, not a generic filter. Cost mechanic not properly represented.
PowerBoost target is ChooseOwnCharacter (singular choice). Text says 'Up to 1 of your Characters', which allows 0 as a choice. Target scope may need optional selection logic.

suggestedDsl.name: OP11-004
suggestedDsl.effectText:
[On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Navy} type card other than [Kujyaku] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
[Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: Up to 1 of your Characters gains +1000 power during this turn.

thenActions.description: Place remaining peeked cards at bottom of deck in any order
